text: Moving from the anticipation and slight unease of the empty, expectant conference room to the bold and colorful energy of the R+D display, I feel a shift in myself. In the first space, I sense the weight of concern and collective responsibility hanging in the air, making me reflective, even a bit anxious about the problems that demand attention. In the second, I am drawn in by curiosity—a playful, thoughtful mood replaces tension. The words about sunlight and tranquility urge me to accept uncertainty with a serene mind. I feel both humbled and inspired by the invitation to be mindful and creative in how I engage with the world, aware of challenges yet open to possibility.
